title: Use of English - Test 3
explanation:
Use of English - B1+ Test 3

Final mixed review.

questions.text: If they had left earlier, they [*would be|would have been|were] here by now.
The final decision [*will be announced|announces|will announce] tomorrow.
I wish you [*would listen|listened yesterday|had listened now] when I am trying to explain this.
She is said [*to be working|working|that working] on a new novel.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The app helps users ____ their monthly spending. | *track | sentence | launch
We need a stronger sense of local ____.  | *community | receipt | charge
The experiment was carried ____ in a modern laboratory. | *out | away | off
He felt embarrassed and quickly tried to ____ for the mistake. | *apologise | subscribe | conserve
The conference, [*which begins|where begins|whose begins] on Friday, will focus on climate policy.
By the end of the month, she [*will have completed|completes|will completing] the training programme.
He might [*have misunderstood|misunderstood have|misunderstanded] the instructions.
In my opinion, the proposal is useful; [*however|for instance|therefore], it needs a few changes.
